style: Bright chibi/Q-version mobile RPG card art for original Three Kingdoms inspired generals, big expressive glossy eyes, cute compact childlike proportions, oversized heads, small bodies, ornate helmets and exaggerated readable weapons, saturated vertical character-panel composition, no realistic adult proportions, no text, no logo, no watermark, no existing commercial game or anime likeness.

characters.cardPrompt: Liu Bei inspired original chibi benevolent lord, green-gold ceremonial armor, soft round heroic face, huge glossy jade eyes, warm determined smile, paired ornate dual swords held clearly in both hands, gentle emerald-gold vertical promo panel lighting, no text.
characters.battlePrompt: Small 2.5D transparent chibi battle cutout of the same original Liu Bei inspired dual-sword lord, big head, compact Q-version body, twin sword silhouettes readable on both sides, green and gold faction colors, no text.
characters.attackPrompt: Four conservative chibi attack frames from the same cutout, same scale and facing, dual swords crossing into a quick twin slash, transparent background, no text.

characters.cardPrompt: Original chibi Jiang Wei inspired Shu strategist-general, green-teal white and gold ornate armor, huge teal eyes, high ponytail, qilin-themed forked long spear, military scroll at waist, polished mobile RPG card source, no text.
characters.battlePrompt: Transparent chibi battle cutout of the same Jiang Wei inspired warrior, full body centered, forked long spear silhouette readable, military scroll as physical prop, no glow or trails.
characters.attackPrompt: Eight-frame ordinary attack: ready guard, spear lowers, shoulder pulls back, forked blade hooks diagonally, forward thrust lands, tassel follows through, weapon recoils, stance resets.
characters.ultimatePrompt: Eight-frame Musou: command stance with scroll, spear gathers into a compact angled path, body drives forward, heavy finishing thrust, cape and ponytail settle last.

avoid: No existing game, anime, film, or actor likeness
No square or rectangular framed attack effects
No UI-like boxes, card panels, spell-border rectangles, or closed box glyph effects
No runtime square-panel spritesheet effects such as brackeysLightstreaksAnimationKey or lightstreaks-6x5.png
Do not place the sprite low in the frame or leave excessive empty top padding; center visible alpha in each 192x224 animation frame

No baked effect light, cast shadow, ground shadow, glow, energy trail, magic circle, impact flash, particle, aura, or afterimage pixels inside base action frames; export those as overlay effect frames or runtime VFX layers
Every warrior must have unique weapon motion, body action, and effect grammar rather than a color swap
Do not copy the supplied reference image, characters, logo, typography, or exact composition
